rag_rules: AGREE assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports must be placed in valid component type scopes
AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
generic_rules: Component type annexes are the normal location for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equation declarations
Implementation-level bindings such as assignments are used in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Helper declarations should align types with expression types (bool, int, real)
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicit typed ports or constants are exposed
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
Boolean data range comparisons with opaque types
Assumed type vs actual type mismatches
